title: Ghost Vision
description: Ghost Vision is a defensive Minecraft mod designed to neutralize invisibility abuse in multiplayer gameplay.
body:
Ghost Vision: Anti-Invisibility Protection Mod
=======

![ghost vision](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9ca24aa20d4293b4e35fde1fca18689e5057fea_0.webp)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/SqKGpdDW?style=plastic&logo=modrinth&labelColor=0D1117&color=4facfe&logoColor=ffffff)](https://modrinth.com/mod/SqKGpdDW)
[![Source Code](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-GitHub-blue?style=plastic&logo=github&logoColor=ffffff)](https://github.com/Fronobear1/Ghost_Vision)
[![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Fronobear1/Ghost_Vision?style=plastic&logo=github&logoColor=ffffff&color=ff5555)](https://github.com/Fronobear1/Ghost_Vision/issues)
[![Fabric Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-7d5fff?style=plastic&logo=fabric&logoColor=ffffff)](https://fabricmc.net/)


A simple Minecraft mod called Ghost Vision stops players from abusing invisibility in multiplayer games.

Mod users can identify spies and unfair PvP strategies without completely breaking invisibility because invisible players take on a subtle, translucent appearance. Fair, line-of-sight awareness is the only thing present; there are no outlines, wall-hacks, or tracking through blocks.

 The Mod Can be Toggle by the Key {G}
=========


 Important Details
========

displays semi-transparent invisible players.

Both client-side and multiplayer security

No X-ray, ESP, or complete visibility

Performance-friendly and lightweight

Invisibility is kept useful—but not exploitable—by Ghost Vision.
